emails.subject: VPP's get syndicated
emails.body: When the existing VPP's get syndicated into Brazos later this week, then they will be between Brazos [not Entrada] and Crescendo, and Brazos [not ECT Merchant...] and St. Mary's, who is the person responsible for making sure that the ENA contracts group makes the name change [assignment], and that everything in ENA's internal system Sitara gets changed accordingly? And also to make sure that these deals do not get duplicated? thanks

emails.subject: Re: VPP's get syndicated
emails.body: Re: VPP's get syndicated I don't know the answer to that. Does someone else? Teresa Teresa G. Bushman Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3835A Houston, TX 77002 (713) 853-7895 fax (713) 646-3393 teresa.g.bushman@enron.com Joan Quick 12/24/00 04:35 PM
